title: Ops Review Dashboard — Cross-System Anomaly Correlation (English)

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 发布周运营回顾报告征调令，明确目标、时限与只读约束。

updates.total_target: 生成一份综合性的周运营回顾报告，涵盖系统集成状态、Helpdesk工单趋势、库存异常、CRM客户动态、知识库过时文档及定时任务健康状况，并进行跨系统异常关联分析。
updates.deadline: 本周内完成，作为常规周度运营流程的一部分。
updates.boundaries: 数据收集与分析必须是只读操作，严禁修改任何系统数据、发送邮件、更新工单或创建新记录。报告内容需综合指定六个领域的数据，进行跨系统异常关联分析。

meta.stage_description: 大汗发布征调令并定义边界。

title: Ops Review Dashboard — Cross-System Anomaly Correlation (English)

agent_trace.summary: [Allocated] Hundred-household task decomposed into 10 arban sub-tasks for weekly ops review report.

arban_allocations.task_description: Collect an overview of all third-party integration statuses to assess general system health.
arban_allocations.expected_output: List of integrations with their general health status.

arban_allocations.task_description: For any identified unhealthy integrations, retrieve detailed configuration to understand potential issues.
arban_allocations.expected_output: Detailed configuration for critical or unhealthy integrations (requires IDs from arban_01).

arban_allocations.task_description: List all helpdesk tickets that are currently open and marked as high priority to identify urgent issues.
arban_allocations.expected_output: List of high-priority open helpdesk tickets.

arban_allocations.task_description: Collect a list of recently closed helpdesk tickets to identify recurring issues or trends.
arban_allocations.expected_output: List of closed helpdesk tickets for trend analysis.

arban_allocations.task_description: Retrieve a comprehensive list of all products to assess overall stock levels.
arban_allocations.expected_output: List of all products with their current stock levels.

arban_allocations.task_description: Focus on identifying any products with unusual stock counts or specific categories that might indicate anomalies.
arban_allocations.expected_output: Product list with focus on potential anomalies (requires analysis of arban_05 output).

arban_allocations.task_description: Obtain a list of all VIP customers and their current engagement status from CRM.
arban_allocations.expected_output: List of VIP customers with their status.

arban_allocations.task_description: Search the knowledge base for articles that are potentially outdated or require review.
arban_allocations.expected_output: List of potentially outdated knowledge base articles.

arban_allocations.task_description: List all scheduled jobs to check their enabled status and last known health.
arban_allocations.expected_output: List of all scheduled jobs with their status.

arban_allocations.task_description: Review the execution history for a sample of scheduled jobs to detect recurring failures or performance issues.
arban_allocations.expected_output: Execution history for selected scheduled jobs (requires job_ids from arban_09).

updates.readiness: 10 out of 10 arban allocated and ready for execution.
updates.contingency: No shortages identified at this stage.

meta.stage_description: 百户级执行并向下分解到十户级。
